zh.Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安
英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.Raans, Bucks., England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Grove於大約1361年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安時，她的父親Thomas de la Grove24歲，母親Alice de Raan25歲。她於大約1374年與William Brudenell III在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Grove于大约1361年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安时，她的父亲Thomas de la Grove24岁，母亲Alice de Raan25岁。她于大约1374年与William Brudenell III在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Grove
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a grove or thicket, from Middle English grove, Old English grāf, or a habitational name from any of various places so named.
English (of French Huguenot origin): Anglicized form of French Le Groux (see Groux ) or Le Greux.

variants.name: Groves
meanings: English (London): variant of Grove , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Groux
meanings: French: habitational name from any of various places called Le Groux (Charente) or Les Groux (Oise, Yvelines).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Grove was born about 1361, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas de la Grove, was 24 and her mother, Alice de Raan, was 25. She married William Brudenell III about 1374, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Grove est née environ 1361, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de la Grove, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice de Raan, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Brudenell III environ 1374, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Grove um 1361 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de la Grove 24 und ihre Mutter Alice de Raan 25. Sie hat um 1374 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England William Brudenell III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Grove è nata il circa 1361 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de la Grove, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Alice de Raan, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William Brudenell III circa 1374, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.of Raans, Bucks, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Groveが約1361年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた時，父Thomas de la Groveは24歳，母Alice de Raanは25歳であった。約1374年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでWilliam Brudenell IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Grove(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de la Grove(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Raan(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1374년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 William Brudenell III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Grove nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de la Grove, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Raan, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William Brudenell III aproximadamente 1374, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Grove родилась около 1361 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de la Grove было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Raan, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brudenell III около 1374 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Grove nació aproximadamente 1361, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de la Grove, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice de Raan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William Brudenell III aproximadamente 1374, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
